final:
// // When enable is HIGH (0), the output will be set to the value of in1. When enable is LOW (1), the output will be set to the value of in2.
module top_module(
  input enable,
  input [7:0] in1,
  input [7:0] in2,
  output reg [7:0] out
);always @(*) begin
    if (enable == 1'b0) begin
      out = in1;
    end else begin
      out = in2;
    end
  end

endmodule

params_used.custom_text: // When enable is HIGH (0), the output will be set to the value of in1. When enable is LOW (1), the output will be set to the value of in2.
